198.reason: [Error: When a single '&' is encountered (error type 'a'), the code incorrectly assigns the token type AND instead of treating it as an error. The token should not be added to the hashMap, and the lexical analysis should stop or handle the error properly without generating a token.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When a single '&' is encountered (error type 'a'), the code incorrectly assigns the token type AND instead of treating it as an error. The token should not be added to the hashMap, and the lexical analysis should stop or handle the error properly without generating a token.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assigns LexType.AND to a single '&'; should not create a valid token but instead treat it as an error without storing it as AND]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assigns LexType.AND to a single '&', which is invalid; should not create a token and must only report error]

248.reason: [Error: When a single '|' is encountered (error type 'a'), the code incorrectly assigns the token type OR instead of treating it as an error. The token should not be added to the hashMap, and the lexical analysis should stop or handle the error properly without generating a token.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly assigns LexType.OR to a single '|', which is invalid; should not create a token and must only report error]
